title: おあげの魅力には抗えない

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I head into the cafeteria during the lunch
break, I spot Inari One with a veritable mountain
of dishes in front of her.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Boss, ya gotta hear this! Looks like the
cafeteria has gone and changed their fried tofu
supplier.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Boss, ya gotta hear this! Looks like the
cafeteria has gone and changed their fried tofu
supplier.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
When I tried the inari sushi, it tasted so freakin'
good. Left me absolutely stunned!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
So, I ended up orderin' every fried tofu dish on
the menu! Time to dig in!
choice_data_list: Don't you think you've ordered a bit too much?
Let's enjoy us some fried tofu!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Oof?! Ya don't pull your punches...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I suppose one look at my plate and anyone'd say
that, though. But I can't return the order, so...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Oh, now we're talkin'! I can always try the rest of
the menu some other day. So, I'll hold back on
gorgin' myself this time.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I'll kick things off with the kitsune soba! Haaah!
Look at that fatty tofu soakin' up all the broth!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, I help prevent Inari One from overeating
by sharing in her meal.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Gotcha! I'm gonna scarf down every last bite!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Lookit this thick block of fried perfection! I can
practically taste it already!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Inari One fills her stomach with a feast of
fried tofu dishes.
